title: Ed-ready Architecture Work
summary: Cloud-backed educational lab platform documentation work focused on onboarding, stack comprehension, architecture clarity, and careful review workflow.

logs.title: Merged 10-day Ed-ready onboarding architecture package
logs.details: Added a structured onboarding package that maps the Ed-ready platform across Nuxt routing, stack responsibilities, frontend-to-backend flow, authentication, lab listing, launch flow, lab execution, backend session lifecycle, remote machine architecture, LTI, AWS, Pulumi, and production architecture.

logs.title: Opened documentation cleanup and accuracy audit
logs.details: Started a documentation-only cleanup pass to inventory the docs structure, compare documentation claims against the current codebase, update GitHub-readable indexes, clarify local setup around lab_platform, and separate current implementation reality from older architecture notes.

logs.title: Advanced documentation audit and lab session architecture mapping
logs.details: Reviewed top-level and main technical documentation, converted a generic Nuxt dependency note into repo-specific contributor guidance, added a current Mermaid-based lab session flow diagram, and marked older visual architecture material as partially accurate instead of treating it as source of truth.

logs.title: Paused cloud quick start rewrite pending maintainer direction
logs.details: Identified that the cloud quick start should wait for the related deployment flow review to settle before being rewritten. The next pass is intentionally approval-gated so the documentation reflects the accepted path rather than stale setup assumptions.

nextSteps: Wait for maintainer direction on the cloud deployment documentation source of truth
Continue documentation audit with non-blocked technical docs
Review app-specific docs and connect reliable material into the top-level documentation path
Add a setup verification checklist and safe-first-tasks list for new contributors
Convert approved architecture findings into recruiter/client-readable project notes
blockers: Cloud quick start rewrite depends on maintainer approval of the updated deployment path
Live environment validation requires limited access or maintainer-provided verification
Older visual diagrams should be retained until maintainers confirm whether to replace, rebuild, or archive them
